intro:
The same scenery, the same routine.
But today, “something” was different…
description:
This title is a psychological horror game in which you play as a train conductor on a local line in Japan.

●Story
As usual, the protagonist begins his shift driving a local train deep in the mountains.
However, as he goes about his duties, mysterious and inexplicable events gradually begin to unfold...

●Game Features
- A horror game set in Japan
- Train driver duties experience
- A first-person 3D horror game
- Features five different endings

●Additional elements
A new ending has been added.
